2605.29584.title: GAPD: Gold-Action Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning in Knowledge Base Question Answering
2605.29584.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a natural fit for agentic knowledge base question answering (KBQA), where a model must issue executable actions, observe knowledge-base feedback, and eventually return an answer. However, current RL-based KBQA systems mainly optimize sparse rewards from the final answer, leaving intermediate action errors weakly supervised. This is especially limiting for logical-form annotated KBQA benchmarks: gold logical forms can be converted into executable action sequences, but existing pipelines use them mainly for warm-start data construction rather than for on-policy RL updates. We propose GAPD, a training-time Gold-Action Policy Distillation framework that adds dense token-level guidance to outcome-based RL. To align gold actions with on-policy student rollouts, GAPD uses MID-ANCHOR MATCHING: it treats the intermediate entities reached during student exploration and gold execution as state anchors, and matches student states to gold states through these explored entity sets. The current policy conditioned on this aligned gold action serves as a stop-gradient teacher, whose token distribution is distilled back to the ordinary student policy over generated action-token spans. GAPD consistently surpasses the current state of the art on WebQSP, GrailQA, and GraphQ.
2605.29584.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）自然適合於代理知識庫問題回答（KBQA），在這裡模型必須發出可執行的行動，觀察知識庫的反饋，並最終返回答案。<lb/>然而，目前基於RL的KBQA系統主要優化來自最終答案的稀疏獎勵，導致中間行動錯誤的監督較弱。<lb/>這對於邏輯形式註釋的KBQA基準特別有限：金標邏輯形式可以轉換為可執行的行動序列，但現有的流程主要將其用於熱啟動數據構建，而不是用於政策內的RL更新。<lb/>我們提出GAPD，一個訓練時的金行動政策蒸餾框架，為基於結果的RL添加了密集的標記級指導。<lb/>為了將金行動與政策內的學生展開對齊，GAPD使用MID-ANCHOR MATCHING：它將在學生探索和金執行過程中達到的中間實體視為狀態錨點，並通過這些探索的實體集將學生狀態與金狀態匹配。<lb/>基於這個對齊的金行動的當前政策作為停止梯度的教師，其標記分佈被蒸餾回生成的行動標記範圍內的普通學生政策。<lb/>GAPD在WebQSP、GrailQA和GraphQ上始終超越當前的最先進技術。
2605.29584.author: Xin Sun et.al.
2605.29584.authors: Xin Sun, Jianan Xie, Zhongqi Chen, Qiang Liu, Shu Wu, Bowen Song, Weiqiang Wang, Zilei Wang, Liang Wang
